name: opl-doc
description: OPL-native developer document lifecycle governance and software-engineering closeout skill.

interface.shortDescription: OPL-native docs lifecycle and engineering closeout governance.
interface.longDescription: Provides OPL Doc skills and doctor scripts for OPL family document lifecycle management, stale doc retirement, active/history/tombstone folding, and software-engineering closeout workflows. The opl-doc-governance skill name remains as a compatibility entry.
defaultPrompt: Use OPL Doc to audit this repo's docs lifecycle.
Generate an OPL family docs lifecycle work plan.
Review active docs for stale lifecycle pollution and tombstone candidates.
